About Toshkin

With explosive marketing and reaching places that no other memecoin has reached, we are soon to lunch cross-bridges to the Ethereum network, bringing a new typeand deep liquidity of audience to the most fun memecoin today.

TOSHKIN is the meme coin with an attitude set to be the next hype on the SOLANA network. It's also natively trades on ETH, BASE, and BSC. Its fun, popular, and beloved token similar to today's hypes such as Dogecoin, WIF, Floki, Bonk, and PEPE, with an attitude twist and sea of new features.

The TOSHKIN Project has excited and motivated a team of 26 highly capable individuals, pushing through the Metaverse.

NFT and Binance

TOSHKIN has unique characteristics that make it shine among other current coins.

We are introducing AI integration and a rare, unique NFT collection featuring the cutest designs.

By purchasing any of our rare and valuable NFTs, you're directly contributing to our goal of being listed on the world's largest exchange -Binance.

Be a part of this exciting journey and help us soar to new heights in the cryptocurrency market! 100% of NFT purchases and USDT fees from this wallet will be allocated towards listing on Binance. Additionally, 10% of the project's marketing wallet, which is replenished daily, will be transferred to the NFT wallet, further bolstering our listing efforts.

TOSHKIN's unique NFTs offer additional whitelist airdrops, special NFT releases, and exclusive presale opportunities!

Strategic allocation of TOSHKIN tokens provides the right balance between early investors, deep liquidity for exchanges, and explosive marketing.

The TOSHKIN team's well-designed tokenomics ensures ongoing interest from investors, maintaining a healthy supply and demand balance, building trust, and supporting continuous price growth.

It fosters the development of new features such as unique NFT offerings and the integration of new AI capabilities.

Our Partners

All Markets

We are thrilled to announce that we are taking a comprehensive approach to promote the TOSHKIN token and strengthen its presence in the cryptocurrency and blockchain markets.

As part of this commitment, we are developing a multifaceted marketing strategy across X, Telegram, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube that generates significant hype and drives high interest in the project.

Our approach to each of these platforms, including Yahoo Finance, CoinTelegraph, YouTubers, calls, and AMAs, is designed to maximize visibility, engagement, and community interaction. We aim to deliver tailored content and initiatives that resonate with each platform's audience while maintaining a consistent message across all channels.

By leveraging the unique strengths of each platform, we can effectively communicate the fun value proposition of TOSHKIN and foster a vibrant and supportive community around the token.
